violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed ice chute on soda dispenser needs to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food inside microwave oven.
Toilet facilities. — ---Observed toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed ceiling in food prep area is textured sheet rock, which is neither smooth, nor cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked and broken floor tiles in food prep area.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
